title: Himmel och pannkaka
actors: Sickan Carlsson, Hasse Ekman, Gunnar Björnstrand
plot: Since Seventh Heaven (1956) Dr. Lovisa Sundelius (Sickan Carlsson) and radio host Villy Lorens (Hasse Ekman) have married, but when Villy becomes a TV host with cutie Suss (Lena Granhagen) by his side, things start to fall apart.
